title: Fox News said to have settled with Tucker Carlson producer for $12 million
text: NEW YORK (AP) — Fox News will pay one of its former producers $12 million to settle her claims that she faced a discriminatory workplace and that the network coerced her into giving false or misleading testimony in Dominion Inc.'s defamation lawsuit, her lawyer said Friday.

title: U.S. ‘very stridently' asking Russia for better access to detained reporter Evan Gershkovich, White House says
text: White House spokesman John Kirby on Wednesday said U.S. officials are continuing to push Russia for more access to detained Wall Street Journal reporter Evan Gershkovich, as he also addressed how Moscow released American basketball star Brittney Griner but continues to hold Gershkovich and businessman Paul Whelan.

title: Soros, Buffet and Munger: Where are the old guard now?
text: George Soros, 92, said on Monday he is passing down his US$25bln empire to his son, further reducing the number of super veterans still running global businesses.  Soros, known for netting US$1bln through shorting the pound back in the 90s, will now let his son, Alexander, take control of his Open Society Foundation (OSF).
